citations: Tariff Concession Revocation Order HS2007/295A - Tariff Concession Order 0614247 (Cth)
left.combined_normalized_text: tariff concession revocation order under section 269sd(2) of the customs act 1901, i robert crawford a delegate of the chief executive officer (a) revoke tariff concession order number 0405836 made on 27.08.04, in respect of the goods described in table a below. this revocation has effect from 01.01.07; and (b) make in its place the tariff concession orders described in table b. the goods specified in column 1 of table b are goods to which the item in part iii of schedule 4 to the customs tariff act 1995 specified in column 2 of table b applies. the order shall have effect from the date notified in paragraph (a) above as the date of effect for the revocation.

qa_examples.question: Under the Tariff Concession Revocation Order HS2007/295A - Tariff Concession Order 0614247 (Cth), what action did Robert Crawford, a delegate of the Chief Executive Officer, take in relation to Tariff Concession Order Number 0405836?
qa_examples.answer: Under the Tariff Concession Revocation Order HS2007/295A - Tariff Concession Order 0614247 (Cth), Robert Crawford, a delegate of the Chief Executive Officer, revoked Tariff Concession Order Number 0405836, which was made on 27.08.04. This revocation took effect from 01.01.07. In its place, he made the Tariff Concession Orders described in TABLE B. The Order shall have effect from the date notified in paragraph (a) as the date of effect for the Revocation.
qa_examples.citation: Tariff Concession Revocation Order HS2007/295A - Tariff Concession Order 0614247 (Cth)
qa_examples.original_passage: TARIFF CONCESSION REVOCATION ORDER Under Section 269SD(2) of the Customs Act 1901, I Robert Crawford a delegate of the Chief Executive Officer (a) revoke Tariff Concession Order Number 0405836 made on 27.08.04, in respect of the goods described in TABLE A below. This Revocation has effect from 01.01.07; and (b) make in its place the Tariff Concession Orders described in TABLE B. The goods specified in Column 1 of TABLE B are goods to which the item in Part III of Schedule 4 to the Customs Tariff Act 1995 specified in Column 2 of TABLE B applies. The Order shall have effect from the date notified in paragraph (a) above as the date of effect for the Revocation.

support_review.reason: The passage states order 0405836, its original date, revocation date, and replacement by the TABLE B orders.

qa_examples.question: What actions were taken by Robert Crawford, a delegate of the Chief Executive Officer, under Section 269SD(2) of the Customs Act 1901 in the Tariff Concession Revocation Order HS2007/608A - Tariff Concession Order 0614606?
qa_examples.answer: Under Section 269SD(2) of the Customs Act 1901, in the Tariff Concession Revocation Order HS2007/608A - Tariff Concession Order 0614606, Robert Crawford, a delegate of the Chief Executive Officer, revoked Tariff Concession Order Number 0406369 made on 10.09.04, and made in its place the Tariff Concession Orders described in TABLE B. This revocation had effect from 01.01.07. The goods specified in Column 1 of TABLE B are goods to which the item in Part III of Schedule 4 to the Customs Tariff Act 1995 specified in Column 2 of TABLE B applies. The Order took effect from the date notified in paragraph (a) as the date of effect for the Revocation.

qa_examples.question: Under the Tariff Concession Order 1117018 (Cth), when does the order take effect and when does it cease to be in force?
qa_examples.answer: Under the Tariff Concession Order 1117018 (Cth), the order takes effect from 30.05.11 and continues in force until it is revoked under sections 269SC or 269SD of the Customs Act 1901, or until the date specified in Column 2 of THE TABLE, if any.
